title: True Black & White Shader (Grayscale)
description: This shader converts the entire image in the game to black and white, using the formula (R + G + B) / 3 to determine the brightness of each pixel.
body: The shader converts images in Minecraft to black and white using the average of the colors (R + G + B) / 3. It is applied to the world, but does not change the colors of the interface (GUI). ![Blocks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1629758fabac2a9426bb833f126ef6ad5a7e3025.png)
